bucket.description: Formerly the foundry where the famed anti-vampiric weaponologist Santa Ladonna created many trinkets, the Laborratory now lies abandoned. Whispers echo that Santa fled from this makeshift workshop when her experimental alchemy somehow opened a door that was never supposed to be breached.
bucket.name: Laborratory

bucket.description: Seemingly bottomless, the down-reaching doors of this huge, infernal contraption open only when fed the blood of monsters. Summoned by the baneful behavior of a long forgotten clan, the unfathomable depths of these haunted halls whisper with a putrid power that yearns for innocent souls to play with.
bucket.name: Room 1665

Decisive Battle Begin!
Miang vs Orochimario!
Can our Shounen heroine muster the mettle to battle the diabolical dragon for more than a minute?

bucket.description: Forging a path across a frozen lake, the reunited Moonspell Clan are assailed by Oni-summoned clones! Can the Moonspell Clan defeat the Frozen Three-thousand, and free Babi-Onna from her chilly prison?
bucket.name: Frozen Lake

bucket.description: Forging a path across a frozen lake, the reunited Moonspell Clan are assailed by Oni-summoned clones! Can the Moonspell Clan defeat the Frozen Three-thousand, and free Babi-Onna from her chilly prison?

bucket.description: Babi-Onna is freed from the freeze, and joins the Moonspell Clan as they journey to retake their homeland. Their path takes them through the forest, where a team of tricksy Tanuki assail them with a testing trail - is that a tail, or are you just pleased to see me?
bucket.name: Tanuki Forest

bucket.description:
Ancestral Rematch Begin!
At last, the Moonspell Clan strike back to reclaim their home, now overrun by Yokai and Oni. Survive against these otherworldly foes, and strike down the eightfold menace, Orochimario!
bucket.name: Mt. Moonspell

Meeting Called
bucket.description:
Red has been called to an Emergency Meeting, but nobody else is here... what's going on?
Why have the doors locked? And were there always so many bins in the meeting room?
Someone needs to report this mess!

Why have the doors locked? And were there always so many bins in the meeting room?
Someone needs to report this mess!
bucket.name: Meeting Called

bucket.description:
Red has been called to an Emergency Meeting, but nobody else is here... what's going on?
Why have the doors locked? And were there always so many bins in the meeting room?

bucket.name: Suspect Security
bucket.description: The report got through to HQ, and the station has been placed on lockdown for our safety - which would be very reassuring if we weren't locked outside. Maybe if we can find the Engineer we could sneak back in through the vents.

The report got through to HQ, and the station has been placed on lockdown for our safety - which would be very reassuring if we weren't locked outside. Maybe if we can find the Engineer we could sneak back in through the vents.
bucket.name: Suspect Security

bucket.description: The report got through to HQ, and the station has been placed on lockdown for our safety - which would be very reassuring if we weren't locked outside. Maybe if we can find the Engineer we could sneak back in through the vents.

bucket.name: Ejected
bucket.description: The vent lead us away from those weird extra-terrestrials, but we seem to have stumbled into a warren of space rabbits and duck astronauts. I suppose we should use this opportunity to research such strange creatures.

bucket.name: Don't Get Ghosted
bucket.description:
Following a colony of space rabbits into an underground cave might not have been the best idea.
I wonder if this creepy cavern is where all the other Crewmates ended up...

bucket.name: Space Rocks
bucket.description: Something suspicious is going on back at the base. Angry aliens are attacking, Crewmates are missing, and all sort of paranormal creatures (though definitely no ghosts) lurk in every corner. Let's figure out what happened using the power of logic and science!

bucket.description: Something suspicious is going on back at the base. Angry aliens are attacking, Crewmates are missing, and all sort of paranormal creatures (though definitely no ghosts) lurk in every corner. Let's figure out what happened using the power of logic and science!

bucket.name: Emergency Meating
bucket.description: The sudden appearance of those three weirdos has interfered with the experiments in the Specimen Room! Some innovative bean-biology project has gone awry, and a bizzare meat creature is summoning swarms of angry aliens. Whatever it is, we're ejecting it!

The sudden appearance of those three weirdos has interfered with the experiments in the Specimen Room! Some innovative bean-biology project has gone awry, and a bizzare meat creature is summoning swarms of angry aliens. Whatever it is, we're ejecting it!

Emergency Meating
bucket.description: The sudden appearance of those three weirdos has interfered with the experiments in the Specimen Room! Some innovative bean-biology project has gone awry, and a bizzare meat creature is summoning swarms of angry aliens. Whatever it is, we're ejecting it!

bucket.name: Attack Aggressively
bucket.description: Contra Unit, your new orders are in. The president's son has been kidnapped by mercenaries, and they're demanding advanced military technology from Corpo Inc. as ransom - but we don't negotiate with terrorists. You're the only team though enough to take them on. Airdrop into Galuga Jungle, find their base, and blow it the heck up!

Attack Aggressively
bucket.description: Contra Unit, your new orders are in. The president's son has been kidnapped by mercenaries, and they're demanding advanced military technology from Corpo Inc. as ransom - but we don't negotiate with terrorists. You're the only team though enough to take them on. Airdrop into Galuga Jungle, find their base, and blow it the heck up!

bucket.name: Bullet Biters
bucket.description: Rats! These are no mere mercenaries, they're Red Falcon fighters, traitors of the Alien Wars. We thought that group was destroyed, but it seems like they're back from the dead to kidnap the president's nephew - and they've got you surrounded. Survive until we can send a rescue chopper!

bucket.name: Neo City Chaos
bucket.description: Red Falcon's betrayer bots are trashing Neo City and breaching the defenses of Corpo Inc.'s head office. We don't know what they're after, but it looks like kidnapping the president's cousin's nephew was just a distraction. Crash into downtown and start blasting, Contra Unit.

Neo City Chaos
bucket.description: Red Falcon's betrayer bots are trashing Neo City and breaching the defenses of Corpo Inc.'s head office. We don't know what they're after, but it looks like kidnapping the president's cousin's nephew was just a distraction. Crash into downtown and start blasting, Contra Unit.

bucket.name: Operation: Gun City
bucket.description: Multiple asteroid impacts have been detected in Neo City and are interfering with our comms. Red Falcon have combined Alien Cells with advanced Corpo Inc. beacon technology and have summoned an invasion force! Civilians have been evacuated, so destroy anything that moves, and see if you can find the president's cousin's nephew's dog.

bucket.name: Run & Gun
bucket.description: Come in, Contra Unit, this is Headquarters. We can't get a read on your position and we aren't exactly sure what's going on without accurate reconnaissance - just keep gunning down aliens and running to the right until we say otherwise.

bucket.name: Alien Revengeance
bucket.description: Great work Contra Unit, you've found the source of the alien invasion. You're our only hope, the only squad strong enough to survive in these stinking egg-spawning grounds - shoot those evil space creatures and win the war for humanity.

bucket.description: Amidst a frigid era where all is encased in eternal ice, an unlikely hero decides to rekindle the flame of life and revive the cold bones of this frozen world.
bucket.name: Ice Age

bucket.description: Mortaccio's rattling bones make funny noises as he walks with immortal determination, leading She-Moon towards the ruins of a forsaken factory. Is this skeleton moved by the flame of a long lost love?
bucket.name: Ice Cream

bucket.description: Once upon a time, in the mists of memory an ambitious witch of unstoppable will sought a monstrous power. The only witnesses to this rite were her mouldering minions, who held back all interlopers.
bucket.name: The World Eater

bucket.description: No. Ramba spits fiery insults at Mortaccio, her broken heart still burning with rage - but the skeleton ignores her, too busy crying (figuratively) over spilt (and now frozen) milk. But something catches She-Moon's ear in Ramba's scatching rant: the legend of the firebird.
bucket.name: A Fiery Apparition

bucket.description: Once upon a time, sensing a imminent danger, the noble witch Luminaire rushed to seal the tide of evil poised to roll over the world like an apocalyptic flood. Make haste, good witch, or we perish.
bucket.name: The Guardian of the Lake

bucket.description: Once upon a time, Keitha was dossing off. While her schoolmates dressed to the nines and accepted their diplomas, she rejected pomp and circumstance to musk about with the frivolous imps and sprites of Lake.
bucket.name: The Sly Swashbuckler

bucket.description: Once upon a time, a doughty warrior faced his daily training routine just before his graduation from the Academy. The trees around Lake always need pruning anyway. All in a day's work for the Red Swordsman, the fabled Champion of Horticulture.
bucket.name: The Undefeated Champion

bucket.description: Once upon a time, on a normal summer morning, a bright young mage graduated from Foscari Academy with flying colours. With an official diploma tucked under her arm, she ventures into Lake to play magic tricks with the gnome and fairies.
bucket.name: The Star Pupil

bucket.description: The firebird, Cosmo Pavone, is currently ignoring our heroes and eating toasted seeds. Clearly none of them have truly good intentions, as Cosmo will only aid those of pure heart. She-Moon searches for a real hero, a guardian who will fight for love and justice.
bucket.name: A Pure Heart

bucket.description: After obtaining the power of the fire, She-Moon can finally make her dreams of Promethean heroism come true: bring Roast Chicken back to the table. Let there be cooked food.
bucket.name: The Rebirth, The Return

bucket.description: Once upon a time, three students, one from each of the houses of Foscari, brave a journey into a forest (called Lake) stuffed with mythological creatures, all to have a jolly adventure, with absolutely nothing interrupting the whimsy.
bucket.name: Tides of the Foscari

bucket.description: Greed's gone green. Arcane avarice is transforming these once serene woods into a ghoulish gambling den. Welcome to the Cursino, where you need not be a vampire to fear the stakes.

bucket.description: A lactose labyrinth lies buried in the buttery basement of the Dairy Plant. Home to minotaurs and governed by Trickle-down milkonomics. Grabbing the bull by the horns and cheesing it through this mad maze is the only winning formula.
bucket.name: Mazerella

bucket.description: Fearsome fools flock to this extradimensional card carnival, where survival is a high-stakes game. The beastly buffoons that prowl this floating funhouse aren’t bluffing, so play your cards right or the joke will be on you.

bucket.description: Monsters cavort madly amid a towering edifice of clockwork, rising ever upwards to meet an unchanging moon. The heart of the castle holds the key to Dracula's hollow soul, the vile machinations a reflection of his boundless contempt.
bucket.name: Clock Tower

bucket.description: Dracula’s castle has risen after a century in ruins, casting a malign shadow over the land, poisoning the hearts of mortals with a thirst for chaos. Brave descendants of the Belmont clan take up their whips and strife through the forest to face their eternal foe.
